title: Emmanuel Katto Dubai : How to Automatically Assign People After Importing a To-Do List to Monday.com?

posts.author: masav61862 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE) fairly new to Monday.com and could use some help.

During our meetings, we use an Excel to-do list that we import daily into a Monday board. The Excel file includes an “Action Owner” column, but it only transfers to Monday as a text column.

Is there a way to convert the names from this text column into a People column automatically, so assignments are set correctly? Any tips or solutions would be greatly appreciated. Thanks!
Regards
Emmanuel Katto
